title: clerodendrum pauciflorum
intro: Clerodendrum pauciflorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, commonly known as the few-flowered clerodendrum or few-flowered glory bower. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum pauciflorum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, the plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
